mapper.insert: INSERT INTO article_collection (article_id, user_id, folder_id, create_time, update_time, deleted, deleted_time) VALUES (#{articleId}, #{userId}, #{folderId}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted}, #{deletedTime})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM article_collection WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM article_collection WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND user_id = #{userId}
